questions.leftDesc: Jump into the tag game shouting 'You're it!' and chase everyone around until you're all laughing breathless.
questions.rightDesc: Sneak behind the slide to plan the ultimate secret fort, sketching out where the lookout tower goes.

questions.leftDesc: Mash all the buttons at once to see what crazy combos happen, learning by exploding things first.
questions.rightDesc: Watch the whole tutorial carefully, memorizing each control before your first real attempt.

questions.leftDesc: Soar through fluffy clouds feeling the wind in your hair, racing birds across the bright blue sky.
questions.rightDesc: Read your pet's mind to finally know why they stare at that corner every single night.

questions.prompt: Friend is sad—how do you help?
questions.leftDesc: Make the silliest faces and do a goofy dance until they can't help but crack up laughing.
questions.rightDesc: Sit close and give a gentle hug, letting them know you're there without saying a word.

questions.leftDesc: Know every game, cake flavor, and guest ahead of time so you can plan your perfect outfit.
questions.rightDesc: Walk in ready for surprises, excited to discover what fun activities await behind the door.

questions.leftDesc: Grab the marker and assign everyone jobs, making sure the project is the best in class.
questions.rightDesc: Let your teammates pick the tasks while you happily help wherever they need you most.

questions.prompt: Recess bell rings—where do you go?
questions.leftDesc: Run to the big game where everyone's playing, joining in and meeting new kids from other classes.
questions.rightDesc: Find your bestie and head to your special spot to share secrets and silly inside jokes.

questions.prompt: New LEGO set—how do you build?
questions.leftDesc: Follow the picture instructions step by step, making it look exactly like the box shows.
questions.rightDesc: Dump all pieces out and build something completely new from your own wild imagination.

questions.leftDesc: Try that weird blue bubblegum swirl even though nobody knows what flavor it actually is.
questions.rightDesc: Get your trusted chocolate chip cookie dough that makes you happy every single time.

questions.leftDesc: Stand center stage with the spotlight on you, performing your act for the cheering crowd.
questions.rightDesc: Work backstage pulling curtains and cueing music, making sure everything runs perfectly.

questions.prompt: Big assignment due—when do you start?
questions.leftDesc: Pull an all-nighter the night before, powered by energy drinks and last-minute panic motivation.
questions.rightDesc: Start weeks early with a color-coded plan, finishing stress-free days before the deadline.

questions.leftDesc: Step in as peacemaker, texting both sides to meet up and hash out the misunderstanding together.
questions.rightDesc: Stay completely out of it, keeping your head down until the storm passes on its own.

questions.prompt: You bombed a test—how do you cope?
questions.leftDesc: Shake it off quickly, telling yourself one bad grade won't define your entire academic career.
questions.rightDesc: Replay every wrong answer in your head for days, wondering what you could have studied more.

questions.leftDesc: Volunteer to speak first, getting it over with and enjoying the relief while others stress.
questions.rightDesc: Handle the slides and tech, clicking through while your partner does all the talking.

questions.leftDesc: A steady paycheck and clear career path, building savings and security step by step.
questions.rightDesc: Chase what truly excites you, even if it means an uncertain path with bigger risks.

questions.leftDesc: Schedule a meeting to argue your case point by point, presenting evidence for a better score.
questions.rightDesc: Accept it and move on, not worth the awkward confrontation or potential teacher grudge.

questions.leftDesc: Create a color-coded calendar with every subject blocked out perfectly across the two weeks.
questions.rightDesc: Wing it based on vibes, studying whatever feels most urgent the night before each exam.

questions.leftDesc: Pump everyone up in the huddle with an epic speech that gets the whole team screaming hyped.
questions.rightDesc: Draw up the winning play on the whiteboard, focusing on strategy to outsmart the opponents.

questions.prompt: First day at new school—your approach?
questions.leftDesc: Introduce yourself to everyone you pass, collecting names and making plans by lunch time.
questions.rightDesc: Observe the social dynamics quietly for a week, figuring out where you'd naturally fit in.

questions.leftDesc: Backpack solo through hostels across continents, meeting strangers who become lifelong friends.
questions.rightDesc: Road trip with your squad in a rented van, hitting beaches and sharing every moment together.

questions.prompt: New work project lands—your first step?
questions.leftDesc: Dive straight in and start building, iterating fast and fixing things as you learn what works.
questions.rightDesc: Map out every requirement and milestone first, creating a detailed plan before any action.

questions.leftDesc: Work the entire room collecting business cards, chatting briefly with as many people as possible.
questions.rightDesc: Find one interesting person and have a genuine deep conversation that actually feels meaningful.

questions.leftDesc: Take the corporate ladder job with clear promotions, benefits, and a predictable five-year trajectory.
questions.rightDesc: Bet on the startup gamble with equity, chaos, and the chance to build something truly new.

questions.leftDesc: Analyze the feedback objectively, extracting actionable items while keeping emotions completely separate.
questions.rightDesc: Feel the sting first, processing the disappointment before you can think about next steps.

questions.leftDesc: Create a Google Doc itinerary with every restaurant, museum, and train connection locked in advance.
questions.rightDesc: Book the flight only and figure out everything else on the ground when inspiration strikes.

questions.prompt: Roommate tension brewing—how do you handle it?
questions.leftDesc: Have the awkward direct conversation now, clearing the air even though it feels uncomfortable.
questions.rightDesc: Leave passive-aggressive sticky notes hoping they get the hint without confrontation required.

questions.leftDesc: Experiment with a wild untested idea, accepting failure is likely but the upside is huge.
questions.rightDesc: Stick to a proven model that already works, minimizing risk while building steady income.

questions.leftDesc: Hit the group chat hard, FOMO-fueled and ready to rally even though you're already tired.
questions.rightDesc: Decline everything guilt-free, couch and comfort shows calling your name after a long week.

questions.leftDesc: Inbox zero warrior, every email sorted or deleted within 24 hours of arrival without exception.
questions.rightDesc: 10,000 unread and somehow still functioning, finding what matters when it actually matters.

questions.leftDesc: Haggle hard with comparable listings printed out, willing to walk away if they won't budge.
questions.rightDesc: Just pay the listed price to avoid the stress, the hassle isn't worth the potential savings.

questions.prompt: Life philosophy at this stage—what guides you?
questions.leftDesc: Maximize experiences now while you're healthy, collecting memories over material possessions.
questions.rightDesc: Build lasting legacy and foundations, planting trees whose shade you may never enjoy personally.

questions.leftDesc: Address it formally in a meeting, documenting concerns and pushing for systemic resolution.
questions.rightDesc: Suggest a casual coffee chat first, building personal rapport before tackling difficult topics.

questions.leftDesc: Continue climbing the ladder you've built, leveraging seniority and expertise for higher positions.
questions.rightDesc: Pivot to your true calling, starting over in a field that actually makes your heart sing.

questions.leftDesc: Max out retirement contributions immediately, letting compound interest work its decades-long magic.
questions.rightDesc: Splurge on something special you've wanted forever—life's too short for delayed gratification.

questions.leftDesc: Approach it logically, identifying the core issue and proposing a fair solution for both sides.
questions.rightDesc: Reconnect emotionally first, making sure you both feel heard before tackling the actual problem.

questions.prompt: Major life decision ahead—how do you decide?
questions.leftDesc: Trust the gut instincts you've developed over decades of experience and pattern recognition.
questions.rightDesc: Deep-dive research with spreadsheets, pros/cons lists, and consultation with multiple experts.

questions.leftDesc: Power through the quarter, pushing past exhaustion because the project can't wait for your limits.
questions.rightDesc: Take mental health days now, knowing sustainable performance requires actual rest and recovery.

questions.prompt: Want to learn something new—your method?
questions.leftDesc: YouTube university at your own pace, piecing together free tutorials when motivation strikes.
questions.rightDesc: Sign up for a structured course with deadlines, assignments, and proper certification at the end.

questions.leftDesc: Host and curate the entire evening, controlling menu, seating, and conversation flow perfectly.
questions.rightDesc: Attend as a guest, showing up with wine and enjoying the food without any of the stress.

questions.prompt: Life throws a major curveball—your instinct?
questions.leftDesc: Lean into the chaos as opportunity, seeing disruption as a chance to reinvent everything.
questions.rightDesc: Anchor down to stability, protecting what you've built and weathering the storm carefully.
